falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 3.5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend reversal, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 2.5x the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would signal a confirmed breakout or panic selling, contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict and indicating a clear directional move rather than indecision.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 futures gap up by 2.0% on an earnings announcement day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant gap-up on a major earnings event would demonstrate strong bullish conviction, directly refuting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a catalyst-driven rally.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
